message:
fix: wire Security page tabs to distinct content per tab (#9859)

* fix: wire Security page tabs to distinct content per tab (Fixes #9856)

Per-tab content (Overview / Issues / RBAC / Compliance) was previously passed
as DashboardPage children, which renders BELOW the static "Security Cards"
section (ISO 27001 + Security Issues). Because that cards section dominated
the visible viewport and never changed, every tab looked identical to users
even though the conditional content was technically rendered further down the
page.

Move the per-tab content into a `tabContent` variable rendered inside
`tabsSection` (passed via `beforeCards`), so the active tab's content
appears immediately below the tab buttons. The dashboard cards section now
follows the tab content, preserving customization while making tab navigation
visibly responsive.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: drop issue ref from JSX comment to satisfy hex ratchet

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
